name: SQLite Browser
description: Explore, query, and inspect SQLite databases with ease. List tables, preview results, and view det
longDescription: SQLite database MCP server providing comprehensive database interaction. Execute SQL queries, list tables, describe schemas, and perform CRUD operations. Supports read-only and read-write modes.
author: ai.smithery
examplePrompts: List all tables in the database
Show me the schema of the users table
Run a query to find all active users
Create a new table for products
